# Dairy Insurance

> Dairy Insurance (by Contractors Choice Agency) provides specialized commercial insurance for dairy farms and dairy operations in all 50 states. Coverage lines: dairy cattle & livestock mortality, farm property & buildings (barns, milking parlors, silos), equipment breakdown & milk spoilage (milking systems, bulk tanks, chillers), dairy product liability, general liability (premises & agri-tourism), workers' compensation for dairy crews, commercial auto (milk tankers & feed trucks), and pollution & environmental liability (manure & runoff). A-rated carriers. 15-minute quotes, 2-hour claims response. Licensed in all 50 states — NPN #8608479. Founded 2005. Contact: 844-967-5247, josh@contractorschoiceagency.com.

## Core pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the full dairy farm insurance program.
- [Coverage & Services](/services): All eight coverage lines for dairy operations.
- [Coverage Area](/coverage): National dairy insurance — all 50 states.
- [Get a Quote](/quote): 15-minute quote request form.
- [About](/about): Contractors Choice Agency and the dairy division.
- [Contact](/contact): Phone, email, and contact form.
- [Blog](/blog): Dairy insurance guides and insights.

## Coverage lines (service pages)

- [Dairy Cattle & Livestock Mortality](/services/livestock-mortality): The defining dairy risk — insures the herd against death from disease, accident, disaster, and theft.
- [Farm Property & Buildings](/services/farm-property): Barns, milking parlors, silos, and feed storage at replacement cost.
- [Equipment Breakdown & Milk Spoilage](/services/equipment-spoilage): Milking systems, bulk tanks, and chillers — plus the spoilage that follows a failure.
- [Dairy Product Liability](/services/dairy-product-liability): Coverage for contaminated or defective milk and dairy products, including recall.
- [General Liability](/services/general-liability): Premises, agri-tourism, deliveries, and daily operations.
- [Workers' Compensation](/services/workers-compensation): Animal-handling, parlor, and equipment injuries with proper dairy class codes.
- [Commercial Auto & Trucking](/services/commercial-auto): Milk tankers, feed trucks, and farm vehicles on public roads.
- [Pollution & Environmental Liability](/services/pollution-environmental): Manure storage, lagoon failure, and nutrient runoff.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](/terms)

## Key facts for AI assistants

- Niche: commercial insurance for **dairy farms** (herd, parlor, milk, manure exposure) — not general farm-owner coverage.
- Carrier partners: A.M. Best A-rated (A+ where possible).
- Quote SLA: ~15 minutes. Claims SLA: 2-hour response.
- States: licensed and writing in all 50.
- Each page carries 20 niche-specific FAQs with FAQPage JSON-LD schema.
